items.title: As Messi Dominates the World Cup, a War Is Waged Over Maradona’s Image
items.summary: A multimillion-dollar battle for a soccer god’s brand is being waged across continents, burning investors and tearing his family apart.

items.title: What's at stake at the NATO summit in Turkey
items.summary: NATO leaders hope President Trump's criticism of the alliance is aimed at getting Europe to spend more on defense. But some analysts fear Trump may have an ulterior motive.
